tasks.title: Setup Core Project Architecture and LLM Provider System
tasks.description: Initialize the project structure with modular LLM provider architecture supporting Claude, EXAONE 3.5, and GPT-4 APIs for natural language prompt analysis
tasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for each provider with mock API responses. Integration tests with actual API calls using test prompts. Validate MusicParams extraction accuracy and provider switching functionality.

subtasks.title: Initialize Python Project Structure and Dependencies
subtasks.description: Create project directory structure, set up virtual environment, and install required dependencies
subtasks.details:
Create main project directory with src/, tests/, docs/ folders. Initialize git repository and .gitignore. Set up Python virtual environment (venv). Create requirements.txt with anthropic, openai, requests, pydantic, python-dotenv. Install all dependencies. Create __init__.py files for proper module structure.

✅ .env 파일에 LLM Provider API 키 설정 추가 (Claude, OpenAI, EXAONE)

subtasks.testStrategy: Verify virtual environment activation, check all dependencies are installed with correct versions, ensure project structure follows Python best practices

subtasks.title: Create MusicParams Data Model and Configuration System
subtasks.description: Implement MusicParams dataclass for structured music parameter representation and configuration management
subtasks.details:
Create models.py with MusicParams dataclass using Pydantic for validation. Include fields: genre, mood, tempo, key, time_signature, instruments, duration, style_descriptors. Implement config.py for environment variable management using python-dotenv. Create .env.example template. Add configuration class for API keys and model parameters with validation.
<info added on 2025-06-27T01:36:55.373Z>
MusicParams 데이터 모델과 설정 시스템 구현 완료:

✅ MusicParams 데이터 모델 구현 완료

- Pydantic 검증 로직 구현
- 유틸리티 메서드 (to_filename, to_genre_path, get_summary)

✅ 설정 관리 시스템 구현 완료
- LLMProviderSettings: 다중 LLM Provider 지원
- DatabaseSettings: 데이터베이스 설정
- MIDISettings: MIDI 생성 및 출력 설정
- LoggingSettings: 로깅 설정
- 환경 변수 자동 로드 및 검증

- Config 클래스에 extra='ignore' 설정

✅ .env.example 템플릿 파일 생성
- 모든 환경 변수 설명과 예시 포함
- LLM Provider API 키 설정 가이드
- 각 설정 섹션별 상세 설명

✅ 테스트 완료
- MusicParams 객체 생성 및 메서드 테스트 성공
- Settings 로드 및 검증 테스트 성공

다음 단계: Abstract LLMProvider Base Class 구현 준비 완료

subtasks.testStrategy: Unit tests for MusicParams validation, test configuration loading from environment variables, verify default values and error handling

subtasks.title: Implement Abstract LLMProvider Base Class
subtasks.description: Design and implement the abstract base class for LLM providers using ABC pattern
subtasks.details: Create providers/base.py with abstract LLMProvider class. Define abstract method analyze_prompt(prompt: str) -> MusicParams. Add common utilities: prompt templating, response parsing, error handling base methods. Include provider configuration attributes (model_name, temperature, max_tokens). Implement logging setup for providers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test abstract class cannot be instantiated directly, verify inheritance works correctly, test common utility methods

subtasks.title: Implement Claude Provider with Anthropic API
subtasks.description: Create concrete implementation of LLMProvider for Claude using Anthropic API
subtasks.details: Create providers/claude_provider.py implementing ClaudeProvider. Initialize with Anthropic client using API key from config. Implement analyze_prompt method with proper prompt engineering for music parameter extraction. Handle Claude-specific response format and parse to MusicParams. Add retry logic and error handling for API calls. Use Claude-3-sonnet model with appropriate temperature settings.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Anthropic API responses for unit tests, test prompt formatting, verify MusicParams parsing from Claude responses, test error handling scenarios

subtasks.title: Implement EXAONE and GPT-4 Providers
subtasks.description: Create concrete implementations for EXAONE 3.5 and GPT-4 providers following the established pattern
subtasks.details: Create providers/exaone_provider.py for EXAONE 3.5 integration using requests library for API calls. Implement custom request handling for EXAONE API endpoints. Create providers/gpt_provider.py using OpenAI client for GPT-4. Implement analyze_prompt for both providers with model-specific prompt optimization. Ensure consistent MusicParams output across all providers. Add provider-specific configuration options.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock API responses for both providers, test consistency of MusicParams output across providers, verify error handling and retry logic, integration tests with actual APIs using test prompts

tasks.title: Implement Music Parameter System and Prompt Engineering Engine
tasks.description: Create comprehensive music parameter extraction system that converts natural language prompts into structured musical parameters including genre hierarchy, instruments, and song parts
tasks.details:
Implement MusicParams dataclass with all required fields (instrument, song_part, genre, sub_genre, style_variant, mood, tempo, key, time_signature, complexity, duration, energy_level). Create prompt engineering templates for each LLM provider to ensure consistent parameter extraction. Implement validation logic for musical parameters (valid keys, tempo ranges, time signatures).

Pseudo-code:
```python
@dataclass
class MusicParams:
    instrument: str
    song_part: str  # intro, verse, chorus, bridge, outro
    genre: str
    sub_genre: str
    style_variant: str
    mood: str
    tempo: int
    key: str
    time_signature: str
    complexity: str
    duration: str
    energy_level: str

class PromptEngineer:
    def create_analysis_prompt(self, user_prompt: str) -> str
    def validate_params(self, params: MusicParams) -> bool
```
tasks.testStrategy: Test parameter extraction with various natural language inputs. Validate genre hierarchy mapping accuracy. Test edge cases with incomplete or ambiguous prompts. Verify parameter validation logic with invalid inputs.

tasks.title: Build Database Schema and Genre Hierarchy System
tasks.description: Implement the 3-tier genre classification system with database schema for training data, artist styles, and hierarchical genre relationships
tasks.details:
Create PostgreSQL database with tables for genres (3-level hierarchy), training_dataset, artist_styles, country_genre_variants, and song_title_patterns. Implement genre hierarchy navigation and validation. Create data models using SQLAlchemy ORM. Setup database migrations and seed data for major genres (Hip-hop→Trap→Melodic Trap, Rock→J-Rock→Shibuya-kei, etc.).

Pseudo-code:
```python
class Genre(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'genres'
    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True)
    name = Column(String(100))
    parent_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('genres.id'))
    level = Column(Integer)  # 1=main, 2=sub, 3=style
    characteristics = Column(JSON)

class TrainingDataset(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'training_dataset'
    id = Column(UUID, primary_key=True)
    artist_name = Column(String(200))
    country = Column(String(100))
    genre_level_1 = Column(String(100))
    # ... other fields
```
tasks.testStrategy: Test database schema creation and migrations. Validate genre hierarchy queries and navigation. Test data insertion and retrieval with sample genre data. Verify foreign key constraints and data integrity.

tasks.title: Develop Core MIDI Generation Engine for Drums
tasks.description: Implement the foundational MIDI generation engine starting with drum pattern generation using mido and music21 libraries
tasks.details:
Install and configure mido, pretty_midi, and music21 libraries. Create DrumGenerator class with genre-specific pattern generation for boom-bap, trap, and other hip-hop styles. Implement 4-bar snippet generation with proper MIDI formatting (480 ticks per quarter note, Standard MIDI File Format 1). Create drum mapping for kick, snare, hi-hat, and percussion elements.

Pseudo-code:
```python
class DrumGenerator:
    def __init__(self):
        self.drum_map = {
            'kick': 36, 'snare': 38, 'hihat': 42,
            'open_hihat': 46, 'crash': 49
        }
    
    def generate_pattern(self, params: MusicParams) -> mido.MidiFile:
        mid = mido.MidiFile()
        track = mido.MidiTrack()
        # Generate 4-bar drum pattern based on genre
        return mid
    
    def create_boom_bap_pattern(self, tempo: int) -> List[MidiMessage]
    def create_trap_pattern(self, tempo: int) -> List[MidiMessage]
```
tasks.testStrategy: Generate test MIDI files for different drum patterns and validate in DAW (Ableton Live/Logic Pro). Test tempo accuracy, note timing, and MIDI file format compliance. Verify 4-bar loop seamlessness and genre-appropriate patterns.

tasks.title: Extend MIDI Generation to Bass, Harmony, and Melody Instruments
tasks.description: Expand the MIDI generation engine to support bass lines, harmonic instruments (piano, guitar), and melodic elements with music theory integration
tasks.testStrategy: Test each instrument generator independently and in combination. Validate music theory compliance (proper chord progressions, scale adherence). Test cross-instrument harmony and ensure no note conflicts. Verify instrument-specific MIDI channel assignments.

tasks.title: Create Snippet Management and File Output System
tasks.description: Implement the 4-bar snippet management system with structured file output, metadata generation, and library organization
tasks.details:
Create SnippetManager class for saving, loading, and organizing 4-bar MIDI snippets. Implement file naming conventions (e.g., 'dark_boombap_intro_85bpm.mid'). Generate JSON metadata files with generation parameters, quality metrics, and usage tracking. Create directory structure for snippet library organization by module type (intro, verse, chorus, etc.).

Pseudo-code:
```python
@dataclass
class SnippetMetadata:
    id: str
    filename: str
    module_type: str
    instruments: List[str]
    genre_path: str
    tempo: int
    key: str
    quality_score: float
    personal_rating: int
    usage_count: int
    tags: List[str]
    created_at: datetime

class SnippetManager:
    def save_snippet(self, midi_data: bytes, metadata: SnippetMetadata) -> str
    def load_snippet(self, snippet_id: str) -> Tuple[bytes, SnippetMetadata]
    def search_snippets(self, filters: Dict) -> List[SnippetMetadata]
    def create_variation(self, base_id: str, params: Dict) -> str
```
tasks.testStrategy: Test snippet saving and loading with various MIDI files. Validate metadata generation and JSON serialization. Test search functionality with different filter criteria. Verify file organization and naming conventions.

tasks.title: Implement Artist Style Database and Recognition System
tasks.description: Build artist-specific style recognition and generation system with country-based genre variations for personalized MIDI creation
tasks.details:
Create artist_styles table with style characteristics, influence scores, and notable techniques. Implement country-specific genre variants (K-pop, J-rock, UK drill, etc.). Create artist style analysis system that can generate MIDI in specific artist styles. Add song title generation patterns based on artist and genre combinations.

Pseudo-code:
```python
class ArtistStyleManager:
    def get_artist_style(self, artist_name: str) -> Dict
    def apply_artist_style(self, base_params: MusicParams, artist: str) -> MusicParams
    def get_country_variants(self, base_genre: str, country: str) -> List[str]

class SongTitleGenerator:
    def generate_titles(self, params: MusicParams, artist: str = None) -> List[str]
    def get_title_patterns(self, genre: str, mood: str) -> List[str]

# Example usage:
# "지코 스타일 트랩" -> applies Zico's flow patterns and Korean trap characteristics
# "ONE OK ROCK 스타일 J락" -> applies J-rock emotional progression patterns
```
tasks.testStrategy: Test artist style application with known artist characteristics. Validate country-specific genre variations. Test song title generation for different genres and moods. Verify style consistency across multiple generations.

tasks.title: Build Web-Based Data Management Interface
tasks.description: Create a web interface for manual data verification, artist information management, and training dataset quality control
tasks.testStrategy: Test web interface functionality with sample data. Validate form submissions and data updates. Test batch operations and progress tracking. Verify data integrity after manual edits.

tasks.title: Develop Song Composition and Timeline System
tasks.description: Create the modular song composition system that allows combining 4-bar snippets into complete song structures with automatic transitions
tasks.details:
Implement SongComposer class for combining snippets into full songs. Create timeline management with drag-and-drop functionality. Add automatic BPM and key matching between sections. Implement fade-in/fade-out transitions and volume control. Support export to DAW formats (.als, .flp, .logic).

Pseudo-code:
```python
@dataclass
class SongStructure:
    title: str
    sections: List[SongSection]
    total_duration: float
    bpm_changes: List[Tuple[float, int]]
    key_changes: List[Tuple[float, str]]

@dataclass
class SongSection:
    start_time: float
    end_time: float
    snippet_id: str
    module_type: str
    fade_in: float = 0.0
    fade_out: float = 0.0
    volume: float = 1.0

class SongComposer:
    def create_song(self, snippet_ids: List[str]) -> SongStructure
    def add_transitions(self, song: SongStructure) -> SongStructure
    def export_to_daw(self, song: SongStructure, format: str) -> str
```
tasks.testStrategy: Test song creation with various snippet combinations. Validate timeline calculations and section transitions. Test DAW export functionality with Ableton Live and Logic Pro. Verify BPM and key transition smoothness.

tasks.title: Implement Quality Assessment and Recommendation System
tasks.description: Create automated quality assessment for generated MIDI snippets and intelligent recommendation system for similar or complementary snippets
tasks.testStrategy: Test quality assessment with various MIDI files and validate metric accuracy. Test recommendation system with different user preferences. Verify rating system updates and preference learning. Compare recommendations with manual expert evaluation.

tasks.title: Create Caching and Performance Optimization System
tasks.description: Implement caching mechanisms for LLM responses, generated patterns, and performance optimizations for batch processing
tasks.testStrategy: Test caching functionality with repeated requests. Measure performance improvements with cache hits. Test batch processing with multiple concurrent requests. Validate async operations and error handling.

tasks.title: Build REST API and Web Interface
tasks.description: Create comprehensive REST API endpoints and user-friendly web interface for MIDI generation, snippet management, and song composition
tasks.testStrategy: Test all API endpoints with various request types. Validate file upload/download functionality. Test WebSocket connections and real-time updates. Perform load testing with concurrent users. Test frontend integration and user workflows.
